title: High Demand Home-Based Cleaning & Repair Franchise
supportTraining: Number of Weeks Seller Will Offer Training: 4
description:
High-Demand Home-Based Cleaning & Repair Franchise – Turnkey Opportunity
Business Overview:

Seize the opportunity to own a profitable, home-based franchise in the booming home and commercial restoration industry. Specializing in grout, tile, and stone cleaning, repair, and restoration, this well-established brand is known for its quality service, affordability, and outstanding customer satisfaction.

With low overhead, high margins, and minimal equipment or inventory required, this franchise is ideal for entrepreneurs seeking flexible hours, scalable operations, and a recession-resistant business model.

Key Highlights:

Home-Based Operation – No storefront or expensive lease required

Proven Franchise System – Comprehensive training, marketing support & national brand recognition

Strong Demand – Essential services for aging residential and commercial properties

Low Startup Cost – Skip the ramp-up time and start earning from day one

Flexible Schedule – Ideal for work-life balance or scaling with a team

High Customer Retention – Trusted by homeowners, property managers, and businesses

Services Offered:
Grout repair & sealing, tile & stone cleaning, color sealing, and full-surface restoration.

Whether you're a first-time business owner or a seasoned entrepreneur, this is a turnkey opportunity with strong earning potential and growth-ready infrastructure. Backed by a solid franchisor and a network of industry experts, you’ll be fully supported from day one.

Take control of your future. Be your own boss while providing a high-demand, essential service in a growing market.

Ad#:2323906
